languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."

languages.text: "Нунциус — не череп, а весьма утонченный конструкт и мой дражайший коллега. Твоя вера искажает восприятие действительности и ты видишь смерть даже там, где ее нет, Кибелла".
"Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус — не череп, а весьма утонченный конструкт и мой дражайший коллега. Твоя вера искажает восприятие действительности и ты видишь смерть даже там, где ее нет, Кибелла".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."
"Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."
"Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."

languages.text: «Nuncius no es una calavera, sino un constructo muy especializado y mi querido colega. Su fe distorsiona su percepción de la realidad y le hace ver la muerte donde no está, Kibellah».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius no es una calavera, sino un constructo muy especializado y mi querido colega. Su fe distorsiona su percepción de la realidad y le hace ver la muerte donde no está, Kibellah».

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスは頭蓋骨ではなく、きわめて精巧な構造体であり、我が親愛なる同僚です。あなたの信仰は現実の知覚を歪め、死の存在せぬところにすら死を見せるのです、キベラ」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスは頭蓋骨ではなく、きわめて精巧な構造体であり、我が親愛なる同僚です。あなたの信仰は現実の知覚を歪め、死の存在せぬところにすら死を見せるのです、キベラ」

languages.text: “努恩修斯不是头骨，而是高度精密的构造体，也是我最亲密的同僚。绮贝菈，信仰扭曲了你对现实的认知，甚至让你在没有死亡的地方也看到了死亡。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯不是头骨，而是高度精密的构造体，也是我最亲密的同僚。绮贝菈，信仰扭曲了你对现实的认知，甚至让你在没有死亡的地方也看到了死亡。”

languages.text: "Nuncius ist kein Schädel, sondern ein hochkomplexes Konstrukt und mein geschätzter Kollege. Euer Glaube stört Eure Wahrnehmung der Realität. Ihr seht den Tod selbst dann, wenn er nicht zugegen ist, Kibellah."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius ist kein Schädel, sondern ein hochkomplexes Konstrukt und mein geschätzter Kollege. Euer Glaube stört Eure Wahrnehmung der Realität. Ihr seht den Tod selbst dann, wenn er nicht zugegen ist, Kibellah."

languages.text: « Nuncius n'est pas un crâne, mais un assemblage hautement sophistiqué, et aussi mon plus cher collègue. Votre foi déforme votre perception de la réalité, et vous voyez la mort même là où elle est absente, Kibellah. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius n'est pas un crâne, mais un assemblage hautement sophistiqué, et aussi mon plus cher collègue. Votre foi déforme votre perception de la réalité, et vous voyez la mort même là où elle est absente, Kibellah. »

languages.text: "Nuncius bir kafatası değil, son derece gelişmiş bir yapı ve benim en değerli meslektaşımdır. İnancın, gerçeklik algını çarpıtıyor ve ölümün olmadığı yerde bile ölümü görüyorsun Kibellah."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is not a skull, but a highly sophisticated construct and my dearest colleague. Your faith distorts your perception of reality and you see death even where it is absent, Kibellah."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius bir kafatası değil, son derece gelişmiş bir yapı ve benim en değerli meslektaşımdır. İnancın, gerçeklik algını çarpıtıyor ve ölümün olmadığı yerde bile ölümü görüyorsun Kibellah."
